<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.0.6 Chrome/138.0.7204.100 Electron/37.2.3 Safari/537.36" version="28.0.6"> <diagram id="otel-fig2" name="図2 経路Aの最小構成"> <mxGraphModel dx="-464" dy="-192" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="560" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="app" value="アプリ
(ADOT Java エージェント同梱)
※ Collector なし" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="220" width="200" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cw" value="Amazon CloudWatch（OTLP エンドポイント）" style="points=[[0,0],[0.25,0],[0.5,0],[0.75,0],[1,0],[1,0.25],[1,0.5],[1,0.75],[1,1],[0.75,1],[0.5,1],[0.25,1],[0,1],[0,0.75],[0,0.5],[0,0.25]];outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_aws_cloud_alt;strokeColor=#232F3E;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;dashed=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="560" y="80" width="280" height="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xray" value="xray
/v1/traces" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=#4D72F3;gradientDirection=north;fillColor=#3334B9;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.x_ray;" parent="cw" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="110" y="60" width="48" height="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="logs" value="logs
/v1/logs" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=#F34482;gradientDirection=north;fillColor=#BC1356;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.cloudwatch;" parent="cw" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="110" y="180" width="48" height="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mon" value="monitoring
/v1/metrics
(プレビュー)" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=#F34482;gradientDirection=north;fillColor=#BC1356;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.cloudwatch;" parent="cw" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="110" y="300" width="48" height="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" value="SigV4 / 直接" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=11;" parent="1" source="app" target="xray" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" value="SigV4 / 直接" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=11;" parent="1" source="app" target="logs" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" value="SigV4 / 直接" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=11;" parent="1" source="app" target="mon" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
